nasb.text: And when the dragon saw that he was thrown down to the earth, he persecuted the woman who gave birth to the male child.

esv.text: And when the dragon saw that he had been thrown down to the earth, he pursued the woman who had given birth to the male child.

cnv.text: 龍見自己被摔在地上，就迫害那生了男孩子的婦人。

ccb.text: 巨龙见自己被摔到地上，就迫害那先前产下男婴的妇人。

csbs.text: 那龙一见自己被摔在地上，就追逼那生了男孩的妇人。
